changelog.change: · Bump version to align with BigBoss
· Fix issue where the deb was hidden for the rootless version
· Ensure notifications are posted after reading preferences
· Add support for Dopamine rootless jailbreak

descriptionlist.longdescription:
Main Features:
· Control Center module to instantly hide all photos
· Control Center module to hide Hidden and Recently Deleted albums
· Control Center module to restrict access to recently captured camera photos

Notice:
· Face ID, Touch ID, or a passcode must be enabled to use this tweak.
· On iOS 15/16.x, a respring is required after adding the module to Control Center.
